tests.title: Client credentials grant returns a typed token response
tests.given: A client ID and client secret for a provider token endpoint
tests.then: A grant_type=client_credentials form POST is sent and a typed TokenResponse carrying access_token, token_type, expires_in and optional scope is returned

tests.title: client_secret_basic is the default authentication method
tests.given: A client ID and secret with no explicit auth method
tests.then: The request carries an HTTP Basic Authorization header whose username and password are the form-urlencoded client_id and client_secret, and no client credentials appear in the body

tests.title: client_secret_post places credentials in the form body
tests.then: client_id and client_secret are sent as form parameters and no Basic Authorization header is set

tests.title: Error response is parsed into a typed TokenError
tests.given: A token endpoint that replies with a non-2xx OAuth error body
tests.then: A typed TokenError carrying error, error_description and error_uri (plus the HTTP status) is returned

tests.title: WithScopes sends a space-delimited scope parameter
tests.then: The request body carries scope=a b (single space delimited) per RFC 6749

tests.title: WithExtraParams and WithHTTPClient are applied to the request
tests.then: The extra parameters appear in the form body and the supplied http.Client performs the request
